title: chascolytrum scabrum
intro: Chascolytrum scabrum, also known as Rough Rice Grass or Rough Brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Chascolytrum scabrum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and soothe digestive issues, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Chascolytrum scabrum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and health.
